jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Westside
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Westside! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Rajkot team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Westside:
Westside is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Westside!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
